headline: Big Sky Asset Management Acquires Healthcare Facility in Denton, Texas commencing Partnership with Clarion Partners
summary: Transaction marks Big Sky's fifth acquisition totaling over $100 million in the last 90 daysDENTON, Texas, March 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Big Sky Asset Management, LLC (“Big Sky”) announces the acquisition of a 38,000-square-foot inpatient rehabilitation facility located at 2813 S. Mayhill Road in Denton, Texas. The transaction was completed in partnership with Clarion Partners LLC (“Clarion Partners”), a leading U.S. real estate investment manager with over $72 billion in total assets under

headline: Why Is CVS Health (CVS) Down 1.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: CVS Health (CVS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
